file-674628b50f369.png.alt: Router CLI showing the BLOCK_FB standard ACL in the running configuration and the corresponding show access-lists hit counters.
ocr: SharpeRlt show run Ls access-list access-list standard BLOCK FB remark ACL to block Facebook traffic tor VLAN remark This ACL denies traffic known Facebook CIDR anges remark All other traffic 15 permitted deny 31.13.64 0.0.63.255 deny 157.240 0.0 0.0.255 255 permit any ip access list standard NAT TRAFFIC permit 192.168.100 0.0.0.255 It's workingu permit 192.168 0.0 0.255 SharpeRl#show access-lists BLOCK FB Standard IP access list BLOCK FB 10 deny 31.13.64 wildcard bits 0.0.63.255 (52 matches) 20 deny 157.240 wildcard bits 0.0 255.255 30 permit any (310 matches) SharpeRl#
